title: Container Runtime Interface (CRI) — The API
text:
The kubelet acts as a client when connecting to the container runtime via gRPC.
The runtime and image service endpoints have to be available in the container
runtime, which can be configured separately within the kubelet by using the
--container-runtime-endpoint
command line flag
.
For Kubernetes v1.26 and later, the kubelet requires that the container runtime
supports the
v1
CRI API. If a container runtime does not support the
v1
API,
the kubelet will not register the node.
